'''âdh-f-p''' ('''kadhafap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lunt|lunt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-f-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lunt|lunt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-f-p
|-
! Lemma
| kadhafap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhafap|thidhafap]] || [[word:jidhafap|jidhafap]] || [[word:shidhafap|shidhafap]] || [[word:kidhafap|kidhafap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhafap|thuthudhafap]] || [[word:jujudhafap|jujudhafap]] || [[word:shushudhafap|shushudhafap]] || [[word:kukudhafap|kukudhafap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhafap|thudhafap]] || [[word:judhafap|judhafap]] || [[word:shudhafap|shudhafap]] || [[word:kudhafap|kudhafap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhafap|thudhafap]] || [[word:judhafap|judhafap]] || [[word:shudhafap|shudhafap]] || [[word:kudhafap|kudhafap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhafap|thedhafap]] || [[word:jedhafap|jedhafap]] || [[word:shedhafap|shedhafap]] || [[word:kedhafap|kedhafap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhafap|thothodhafap]] || [[word:jojodhafap|jojodhafap]] || [[word:shoshodhafap|shoshodhafap]] || [[word:kokodhafap|kokodhafap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhafap|thodhafap]] || [[word:jodhafap|jodhafap]] || [[word:shodhafap|shodhafap]] || [[word:kodhafap|kodhafap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhafap|thodhafap]] || [[word:jodhafap|jodhafap]] || [[word:shodhafap|shodhafap]] || [[word:kodhafap|kodhafap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhafap|thĂŠdhafap]] || [[word:jĂŠdhafap|jĂŠdhafap]] || [[word:shĂŠdhafap|shĂŠdhafap]] || [[word:kĂŠdhafap|kĂŠdhafap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhafap|thathadhafap]] || [[word:jajadhafap|jajadhafap]] || [[word:shashadhafap|shashadhafap]] || [[word:kakadhafap|kakadhafap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhafap|thadhafap]] || [[word:jadhafap|jadhafap]] || [[word:shadhafap|shadhafap]] || [[word:kadhafap|kadhafap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhafap|thadhafap]] || [[word:jadhafap|jadhafap]] || [[word:shadhafap|shadhafap]] || [[word:kadhafap|kadhafap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhafap|shadhafap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhafap|goshadhafap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhafap|gokishadhafap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhafapnĂŒ|shadhafapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhafapnknĂŒ|goshadhafapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhafapnĂŒ|gokishadhafapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhafapshĂ«|shadhafapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhafapnkshĂ«|goshadhafapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhafapshĂ«|gokishadhafapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhafapro|shadhafapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhafapnkro|goshadhafapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhafapro|gokishadhafapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhafapmu|shadhafapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhafapnkmu|goshadhafapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhafapmu|gokishadhafapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhafapsher|shadhafapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhafapnksher|goshadhafapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhafapsher|gokishadhafapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhafapng|shadhafapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhafapnkng|goshadhafapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhafapng|gokishadhafapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhafapya|shadhafapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhafapnkya|goshadhafapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhafapya|gokishadhafapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhafapyam|shadhafapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhafapnkyam|goshadhafapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhafapyam|gokishadhafapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhafapnĂŒshĂ«|shadhafapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhafapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhafapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhafapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhafapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhafapnĂŒro|shadhafapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhafapnknĂŒro|goshadhafapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhafapnĂŒro|gokishadhafapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhafapnĂŒmu|shadhafapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhafapnknĂŒmu|goshadhafapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhafapnĂŒmu|gokishadhafapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhafapshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhafapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhafapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhafapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhafapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhafapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhafapshĂ«ro|shadhafapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhafapnkshĂ«ro|goshadhafapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhafapshĂ«ro|gokishadhafapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhafapshĂ«mu|shadhafapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhafapnkshĂ«mu|goshadhafapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhafapshĂ«mu|gokishadhafapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhafapronĂŒ|shadhafapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhafapnkronĂŒ|goshadhafapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhafapronĂŒ|gokishadhafapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhafaproshĂ«|shadhafaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhafapnkroshĂ«|goshadhafapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhafaproshĂ«|gokishadhafaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhafapromu|shadhafapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhafapnkromu|goshadhafapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhafapromu|gokishadhafapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhafapmunĂŒ|shadhafapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhafapnkmunĂŒ|goshadhafapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhafapmunĂŒ|gokishadhafapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhafapmushĂ«|shadhafapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhafapnkmushĂ«|goshadhafapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhafapmushĂ«|gokishadhafapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhafapmuro|shadhafapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhafapnkmuro|goshadhafapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhafapmuro|gokishadhafapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5445898}}
